title: wasm WasmTransport pending map is correctly drained on connection close
description: The onclose closure drains all pending in-flight requests by sending Err('disconnected') through their oneshot channels. This ensures send_request() callers never hang forever after a disconnect. The onclose also resolves the open_rx promise if it hasn't fired yet, so connect() always terminates. A contributor might simplify by just dropping the pending map; that would leave send_request() awaiting forever.
